Redeem single-use voucher — race to use multiple times before DB commit
Apply discount to cart — send 10+ parallel requests to stack discounts
Gift card redemption race — drain card value multiple times before balance update

Withdraw full balance in parallel — race condition on balance check vs debit
Payment double-spend — send 20 parallel requests via Turbo Intruder with single-packet timing
Points/rewards transfer race — inflate transferred points beyond balance

limit_bypass.description: Race conditions to bypass rate limits and per-user quotas

payloads.description: Accept invite code simultaneously — bypass single-use limit via race window
Like/vote simultaneously — inflate count beyond 1-per-user before check commits

Update role during permission check window — TOCTOU on authorization layer
Change email during verification — update email after check but before confirmation sent
Confirm order while modifying cart — TOCTOU between price check and charge

signup.description: Race conditions in user registration and account creation flows

payloads.description: Duplicate account creation — race uniqueness constraint on email before DB commit
OTP brute force via race — send many codes in HTTP/2 single-packet to bypass attempt limits
Username claim race — race first-come assignment before uniqueness check commits

Race reset token consumption — use token in parallel before invalidation
Send reset for attacker + victim simultaneously — race may assign same token to both
Reset with token race — 20+ parallel requests to use single-use token multiple times

2FA verify race — send multiple codes before attempt counter increments

2FA with session binding race — submit OTP to multiple sessions simultaneously
